nodes.name: NT
nodes.summary: NT表示 IUCN 近危等级，当前关联914种鸟类，如帝企鹅、小斑几维鸟、大美洲鸵等914种鸟类。

nodes.name: 灌丛
nodes.summary: 低矮木本植物占优势的陆地生境。

nodes.name: 湿地排水
nodes.summary: 湿地被排干转为农业或建设用地。

nodes.name: Chestnut-backed thornbird
nodes.summary: Chestnut-backed thornbird（Chestnut-backed thornbird，学名 Phacellodomus dorsalis），在图谱中标记为近危（NT）物种，常见栖息地包括灌丛，主要威胁包括湿地排水。

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: It inhabits arid montane scrublands, typically those with short Prosopis or Acacia macracantha trees

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: "Habitat in the Marañón drainage has deteriorated progressively under a prolonged period of cultivation...Fire and clearance of land for agriculture are the principal threats." "The species apparently tolerates some degree of habitat alteration, but whether it can complete its life-cycle or occur at existing densities in heavily cultivated areas is not known." It is considered uncommon and does not occur in any protected areas, so "creation of a reserve is thus a high priority"
